AIPrompts.title: AI Prompts
AIPrompts.subtitle: The exact instructions every AI model receives when analyzing your encounters.
AIPrompts.descriptiveModeCallout: Every prompt below enforces descriptive mode: the AI is told to describe what was captured, never to interpret, diagnose, or suggest clinical conclusions. This is the safety boundary Aurion's pilot operates under.
AIPrompts.phaseBHint: A future update will let you customize these instructions per physician.
AIPrompts.expandLabel: Show the exact instructions sent to the AI
AIPrompts.loadError: Couldn't load the AI prompts catalog.
